image.$description: Image filter. Use on imagery (photos, illustrations) to apply the surface's image treatment. Some brands may not apply a filter.

disabled.$description: Opacity for disabled controls. Use to dim non-interactive controls (disabled buttons, inputs, links) without changing their colour.

demoted.$description: Opacity for de-emphasised content. Use for elements pushed visually into the background while still visible (placeholder previews, inactive list items).

default.$description: Default elevation shadow. Use on any element that should appear lifted above the page (cards, popovers, controls).

inset.$description: Inset stroke. Use with outset to create a decorative offset stroke effect (e.g. on cards). Applied at the block-end and inline-end edges.

outset.$description: Outset stroke. Use with inset to create a decorative offset stroke effect (e.g. on cards). Applied at the block-start and inline-start edges.
